title: DVA Monthly Tests Conducted Statistics: July 2025
body: "The statistics reported within this publication include provisional headline volumes of vehicle, driver, and theory tests conducted during July 2025. Statistics on the volumes of test applications are also included. Trend series from April 2014 onwards are provided for comparison. "

taxons.title: Lorry, bus, coach and specialist vehicle driving tests
Car, motorcycle and van MOT tests
HGV, bus and trailer MOT tests
